goal: Add a side-effect-free audit preflight builder that validates runtime patch consume execution receipt record artifacts are ready for later audit authorization while keeping audit writes, durable writes, patch application, server mutation, route mutation, runtime execution, packages, workflows, deployment, DB, providers, GitHub, and writes closed.
scope_out: Do not write audits, perform durable receipt writes, consume permits, apply runtime patches, mutate server files, mutate route files, run runtime execution, call providers, call DB, call GitHub, change package files, workflows, deployment files, or write files.
claims: Recorded runtime patch consume execution receipt artifacts can be preflighted for later audit authorization without writing an audit.
Audit ref, auditor ref, and audit policy ref are required.
Audit writes, patch application, server mutation, route mutation, runtime execution, and durable persistence remain false.
assumptions: Audit authorization, durable audit persistence, patch application, and runtime execution require later task locks.
dod: Ready, missing audit ref, and incomplete record cases are tested.
Focused test, typecheck, task-lock verify, and diff-check pass.
stop_conditions: Audit write, durable receipt write, permit consumption, runtime patch application, server mutation, route mutation, runtime execution, external calls, DB, GitHub, package, workflow, deployment, or write changes become necessary.
prior_task_findings: BPK-157 produced an in-memory runtime patch consume execution receipt record without durable persistence.
